message:
feat(replay): add fixture harvesting pipeline and ft replay harvest CLI

New 1,763-line module and CLI subcommand for turning real incident/swarm
captures into curated .ftreplay regression artifacts (bead ft-og6q6.7.1).

replay_fixture_harvest.rs (1,763 lines):
- Deterministic redaction and sensitivity tagging using the policy Redactor
- Quality filters to reject low-value or incomplete captures
- Duplicate overlap detection (90% threshold) via content fingerprinting
  to prevent redundant fixtures from accumulating
- Registry persistence for querying fixtures by incident type, risk tags,
  pane context, and capture timestamp
- Schema versioning (REPLAY_FIXTURE_HARVEST_SCHEMA_VERSION,
  REPLAY_FIXTURE_REGISTRY_SCHEMA_VERSION) for forward compatibility
- FNV1a and SHA-256 based content-addressable identifiers

main.rs (+101 lines):
- New `ft replay harvest` subcommand with options:
  --source-dir: directory containing raw .ftreplay captures
  --output-dir: destination for curated fixture artifacts
  --filter: all | incident-only
  --json: machine-readable output
- Replay subcommand restructured to support optional nested commands
  while preserving backward-compatible `ft replay <file>` usage

lib.rs:
- Registers replay_fixture_harvest module
- Alphabetizes ARS module declarations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
